summary: Laptop with a localized bright white blotch on the lower-left of the display; rest of screen dark and intact.
scene_details: A closed-bezel laptop is open on a desk. The screen is otherwise black but shows a concentrated irregular bright white/blueish patch near the lower-left quadrant of the display area. Keyboard and bezels appear normal; defect is on the LCD panel near the inner left edge.

defects.label: bright white spot (screen damage/backlight bleed)
defects.evidence: Irregular, high-intensity white/blue patch on the lower-left of the display against an otherwise black screen; visible halo and pixelated edges indicating localized panel/backlight defect.
